creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rodrigo
Date: Tue Feb 18 16:25:24 2014
New Revision: 344922
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/344922
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r344922/

Log:
  - update iffinder to 1.38
  - fix issues in FreeBSD 10
  - add license
  
  PR:		ports/186560
  Submitted by:	Dikshie <dikshie@sfc.wide.ad.jp> (maintainer)
  Approved by:	bapt (mentor)

Modified:
  head/net/iffinder/Makefile
  head/net/iffinder/distinfo

Modified: head/net/iffinder/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/iffinder/Makefile	Tue Feb 18 16:23:20 2014	(r344921)
+++ head/net/iffinder/Makefile	Tue Feb 18 16:25:24 2014	(r344922)
@@ -2,24 +2,30 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	iffinder
-PORTVERSION=	1.37
+PORTVERSION=	1.38
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.caida.org/tools/measurement/iffinder/download/
 
 MAINTAINER=	dikshie@sfc.wide.ad.jp
 COMMENT=	Tools for find other interfaces for same router
 
+LICENSE=	BSD2CLAUSE
+
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
 PLIST_FILES=	bin/iffinder
 PORTDOCS=	README
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+.if ${OSVERSION} < 1000100
+@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|CC=gcc|CC=clang|g' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
+.endif
+
 do-install:
-		${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/iffinder ${PREFIX}/bin
+		${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/iffinder ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTDOCS} ${DOCSDIR}
+	${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTDOCS} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/net/iffinder/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net/iffinder/distinfo	Tue Feb 18 16:23:20 2014	(r344921)
+++ head/net/iffinder/distinfo	Tue Feb 18 16:25:24 2014	(r344922)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (iffinder-1.37.tar.gz) = 5ad4c0dcacaa8d9cdf2d9e7d54e2f5dca95111183a9ace12ffc0ed3d8a54a513
-SIZE (iffinder-1.37.tar.gz) = 56840
+SHA256 (iffinder-1.38.tar.gz) = d7ca87dd8eb068b6dd97b4a04d814e66afa25c37c8b0c2b99829c18405b36238
+SIZE (iffinder-1.38.tar.gz) = 70380
